settings.editor:
Privacy Policy

Welcome to LV’s Trendz. Your privacy is important to us, and we are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit or make a purchase from our website.

1. Information We Collect

When you use our website, we may collect the following information:

  • Name

  • Email address

  • Phone number

  • Shipping and billing address

  • Payment details (processed securely through payment gateways)

  • Order history

  • Device and browser information

2. How We Use Your Information

We use your information to:

  • Process and deliver your orders

  • Provide customer support

  • Send order updates and tracking details

  • Improve our products and services

  • Communicate promotional offers and new collections (only if subscribed)

3. Payment Security

All payments made on LV’s Trendz are processed through secure and trusted payment gateways. We do not store your complete payment or card details on our servers.

4. Sharing of Information

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. Your information may only be shared with trusted service providers such as shipping partners and payment processors for order fulfillment purposes.

5. Cookies & Tracking

Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve your browsing experience, analyze website traffic, and personalize content.

You can choose to disable cookies through your browser settings.

6. Data Protection

We take reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, misuse, or disclosure.

7. Your Rights

You may request to:

  • Access your personal data

  • Correct inaccurate information

  • Delete your information (subject to legal or order-related obligations)

For any privacy-related requests, please contact us through our website.

8. Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to external websites or social media platforms. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those third-party websites.

9. Policy Updates

LV’s Trendz reserves the right to update or modify this Privacy Policy at any time without prior notice. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on this page.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us through LV’s Trendz.
